titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in P45
P45
The New Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2000 and 2010.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. Further information about the procedures followed may be found in the electronic edition of the majuscules at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Gap at beginning of 4.54 removed by David Parker.
Word break at 10.24 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Gap 28 chars changed to gap rest of verse and gap rest of line at 5.21 by Rachel Kevern.
Wording of editorial note changed and opening word entity moved at 11.42 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 4.54 by Rachel Kevern.
Extra closing word tag deleted at 4.54 by Rachel Kevern.

Uncertain ε deleted, editorial note and rest of verse lacuna tag added at 5.2, uncertain space deleted and editorial note added at 11.4, uncertain space and gaps deleted and rest of verse and line tags added at 11.17, uncertain ν deleted and rest of line and verse tags and editorial note added by Rachel Kevern.
[...]ε[ν] changed to [ειπ]ε[ν] at 10.7 and word break at 10.24 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
[5]τες changed to [λεγον]τες at 11.31 by Rachel Kevern.
οτ[1] changed to οτ[ι] at 4.53 by Rachel Kevern.
ωρα(part word gap) changed to ωρα κα(part word gap) at 5.25 by Rachel Kevern.
[3] changed back to [εις] at 11.54 x 2 by Rachel Kevern.
[λεγον]τες changed to [5]τες at 11.31 and [εις] changed to [3] x 2 at 11.54 by Rachel Kevern.
[ενβριμ] to [εμβριμ] at 11.33, [εδρακυσεν] to [εδακρυσεν] at 11.35 and α/ο υ[δεν] in * and C* at 11.49 made one word by Rachel Kevern.
μ[αριαν] at 11.18 changed to μ[5], word corrected at 11.19, lacuna tag changed at 11.28 by David Parker.
μαρθαν at 11.5 changed to 6 by David Parker.
Nomen sacrum tagged 11.33 by David Parker.
Word break corrected in 11.54 by David Parker.
ιη corrected in 11.4, supplied text changed in 11.28 and 31 by David Parker.
Removal of ghost page and fixing placement of ab and gap across page and column boundaries by Catherine Smith
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0 with manual adjustments.

ab.note: There is a trace of an epsilon on this line but its identification is not secure.
There is a trace of ink here that possibly represents a nomina sacra overline.
There are traces of ink here representing parts of some letters but their identification is not secure.
There is a trace of ink on this line possibly representing a nu but its identification is not secure.
